title: Judicial Data & AI Governance Research Portfolio
description: Official Research Digital Infrastructure (RDI) supporting the Data Governance for Intelligent Justice Systems research programme. Maintained by DJORO Yoboukoua Lionel Arnaud. Contains working papers, research frameworks, governance documents, datasets, software, and academic documentation on Judicial Data Governance, Digital Justice, and Responsible AI for African justice systems.

creators.name: DJORO Yoboukoua Lionel Arnaud
creators.affiliation: Institut National de Formation Judiciaire (INFJ), Ministère de la Justice et des Droits de l'Homme, République de Côte d'Ivoire
